ogTitle: Pokolbin vs Polo Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pokolbin and Polo Flat.
heading: Pokolbin vs Polo Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pokolbin, New South Wales and Polo Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Polo Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Pokolbin (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pokolbin or Polo Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pokolbin has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Polo Flat scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pokolbin scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Polo Flat scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pokolbin or Polo Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Polo Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
